title: HOMIE: Human-object Centric Video Personalization via Multimodal Intelligent Enchancement
innovation_summary: HOMIE: Human-object Centric Video Personalization via Multimodal Intelligent Enchancement: To address both challenges, we propose HOMIE, an HOCVP framework that tackles both inter- and intra-subject input settings in a unified manner.
